subject: Денис, one more thing before Q2
body:
Here's my #1 tech industry takeaway from the start of 2026.

Денис,

Q1 is in the books. Here's the single biggest takeaway I have going into Q2.

💡 First a quick plug: our Spring Flash Promo (https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVGnTW6TSLSVW29rD7j2VV_KVW5b9Bvk5MjwJNN6TZ7t43prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3pPW30yHzF7c3NmhVbf3Y03z2LH0W2j4Wr68TRdfrV9Xpcn7ssydzW8bHxWY1YVR_TW5NJPrx6bzpFQW2QzvXN6FwmrYW1hdlqY8M6-tQW3_FvCN1ZbKjSW6r4n1C3XlQGpN4CGb0gRVtGrN4LWfnnBQbNTW1d0B0-6Zq13qW9dMpsl2ZJFccW5B0x3s8rb9FlW99J9Yv6qx5y-W1kQR-76dM2HFW7wV5ZS1BLdL6N7Z5SCC6Jb17W2BxyL_44rQcFW3mLlyy2DVj16W5QPH8B2Rf72WW6hhM4V3VgMHfW3nvr813RlKCyW5mGCHm7gwMR4W1dMzYL3V87WvW7vVg-L2VSvXlW5HxFxB7-w8w8f6jqBY804 ) ends tonight — this link will lock in 50% off (or more) on any new or upgraded Educative plan.

Okay, now here's the takeaway:

Companies are already starting to pay the price for hiring AI-dependent developers.

Think devs who jumped straight into prompting, agents, and AI tooling — but skipped the foundations underneath.

What's the real cost? It's pretty obvious when you think about it. These developers can’t tell when generated code will break under concurrency. They don’t know why their API design won’t scale. They can’t debug what they didn’t build. That means technical debt is accelerating at a scale we've never seen before.

Here's the reality: AI makes fast engineers faster. It also makes uninformed engineers more dangerous.

The engineers pulling ahead right now? They have both layers:

A) The fundamentals — System Design, data structures, networking, caching, security, observability. The stuff that doesn’t change every 6 months and that AI alone cannot replace.

B) The modern stack — agentic architectures, multi-agent orchestration (CrewAI, AutoGen, ADK), and the judgment to know when AI output is subtly wrong.

One without the other is a gap. Both together is how you become the engineer who gets the call when Q2 headcounts open up.

If this resonates, an Educative subscription is a great way to future-proof your skills and turn yourself into a truly AI-ready engineer. We have hands-on courses built specifically to give you a solid foundation AND a mastery of the modern stack.

You can use the link below 👇  to grab 50% off (or more)... but only for the next couple hours.

Lock in your offer before midnight
(https://learn.educative.io/e3t/Ctc/RG+113/cz5H404/VVGnTW6TSLSVW29rD7j2VV_KVW5b9Bvk5MjwJNN6TZ7t43prCCW8wLKSR6lZ3pPW30yHzF7c3NmhVbf3Y03z2LH0W2j4Wr68TRdfrV9Xpcn7ssydzW8bHxWY1YVR_TW5NJPrx6bzpFQW2QzvXN6FwmrYW1hdlqY8M6-tQW3_FvCN1ZbKjSW6r4n1C3XlQGpN4CGb0gRVtGrN4LWfnnBQbNTW1d0B0-6Zq13qW9dMpsl2ZJFccW5B0x3s8rb9FlW99J9Yv6qx5y-W1kQR-76dM2HFW7wV5ZS1BLdL6N7Z5SCC6Jb17W2BxyL_44rQcFW3mLlyy2DVj16W5QPH8B2Rf72WW6hhM4V3VgMHfW3nvr813RlKCyW5mGCHm7gwMR4W1dMzYL3V87WvW7vVg-L2VSvXlW5HxFxB7-w8w8f6jqBY804 )

Here’s to a strong Q2. Happy learning!

- Fahim
